page_metadata.biotools__summary: Genome Puzzle Master (GPM) enables the integration of additional genomic signposts to edit and build ‘new-gen-assemblies’ that result in high-quality ‘annotation-ready’ pseudomolecules.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Genome Puzzle Master (GPM) enables the integration of additional genomic signposts to edit and build ‘new-gen-assemblies’ that result in high-quality ‘annotation-ready’ pseudomolecules.
